summary: Iter33 strategic positioning shift (VELA Transformation Intelligence™) fully validated. Backend regression 37/37 PASS (test_iter32_verify + test_iter30_drafts_sync + test_iter25_invest + test_iter24_stripe_warmup). Frontend: Landing Hero with new kicker/H1/subtitle, Current vs After VELA Transformation™ split (all metrics + qualitative drag/upside + insight footer), 8 Transformation Intelligence™ feature cards (all slugs, order 01–08, scope tags, ™ titles), all 7 landing sections preserved, /invest/memo/demo renders with letterhead + 7 numbered sections + memo-title 'Koukaki Boutique 1-Bed · Athens' + summary with all required numerics + print + back, InvestDashboard footer has all 3 buttons including new Generate AI Investment Memo™ that navigates to /invest/memo/demo, memo-back navigates back to /invest/asset/demo, /invest/asset/demo regression intact (Edit Inputs panel opens with 5 inputs), /invest landing still renders. Zero blocking bugs found. The iter32 verification gate flow is preserved and untouched.

issues: Minor copy formatting: '€11,920below current asking' lacks space before 'below' (template string concatenation in InvestmentMemo.jsx around line 127). Cosmetic only — doesn't affect any testid or numeric assertion.

action_items: OPTIONAL cosmetic: insert a space before 'below current asking' in /app/frontend/src/pages/invest/InvestmentMemo.jsx (memo-summary template) — currently renders '€11,920below current asking' due to missing whitespace between fmtEUR(...) and the string 'below'.
critical_code_review_comments: InvestmentMemo.jsx line ~127: '{fmtEUR(input.asking_price_eur - (smart?.price_eur || 0))}\n                            below current asking.' — the JSX whitespace collapses since both expression and following text are on adjacent lines after JSX compilation; result is no space between currency and word. Add an explicit ' ' literal between them.

InvestmentMemo.jsx — when accessed at /invest/memo/dft_xxx without location.state it bounces to /invest/asset/<id> with state.autoMemo=true and never auto-opens the memo from there (handler not visible in InvestDashboard.jsx). Worth verifying once a non-demo dft_ asset flow is built. For demo it works fine.
WhyVela.jsx slug derivation `title.toLowerCase().replace(/[™\s]+/g, '-').replace(/-+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '')` correctly produces all 8 expected slugs. Verified at runtime.
seed_data_creation: None — demo uses static client-side constants (INVEST_DEMO_INPUT / INVEST_DEMO_ANALYSIS).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter33 fully passes. Verified testids: landing-hero, landing-hero-headline ('Hidden Hospitality Value — Revealed by AI.'), landing-hero-subtitle, landing-cta-operate/invest, landing-transformation, transform-current (€118/67%/6.9% + Weak/Outdated/Low list), transform-after (€184/82%/13.1% + Luxury/Optimized/Higher list), landing-transformation-insight, landing-differentiators (8 cards: landing-diff-{offer-intelligence|transformation-arbitrage|adr-potential|design-roi|market-mispricing|yield-leaks|ai-investment-memo|district-momentum-signal} with order 01-08 + scope tags). Memo: investment-memo, memo-title, memo-print-btn, memo-back-btn, memo-summary/snapshot/offer/transformation/risks/signals/recommendation. Dashboard footer: invest-footer-memo (Generate AI Investment Memo™), invest-footer-new-asset, invest-footer-operate. Backend regression 37/37 — 0 endpoint changes required for iter33. Console emits some 401s on /api/auth/me / Stripe polling (pre-existing, non-blocking).
